Speaker: Man
Text: This is a record store, bro. We don't do that no mo'.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Well, how much do you charge, man? I just... it's... I just want a trim, y'know, like a taper.

Speaker: Man
Text: Bruh, we don't do that no more.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Look, check it out. You're in beauty, man. That's what it says. And you're in my neighborhood.

Speaker: LPC
Text: I live eight blocks from there, I can walk down there.

Speaker: Man
Text: Okay, come on through and see what we got.

Speaker: LPC
Text: How much you charge for a haircut?

Speaker: LPC
Text: I don't know, I... I'll come down there! What, you don't think I'm gonna come down?

Speaker: LPC
Text: Why don't you come down here, cut my freaking hair?
